response.step_by_step_log: Detected song title 'Magia' at 00:00. Identified the song as the opening theme 'Magia' from 'Puella Magi Madoka Magica', originally by Kalafina. Used search query: 'Magia Kalafina Japanese and English lyrics'. Segments: 00:00-01:42 is the performance. 01:42-05:04 is conversation.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performed by [Performer] with dialogue intervals. Actually, it's a single song 'Magia' performed by VTubers Aki Rosenthal, IRyS, and Roboco-san on a virtual stage, followed by an intermission segment.

scenes.description: VTubers Aki Rosenthal, IRyS, and Roboco-san perform the song 'Magia' on a virtual stage, with the song title 'Magia' appearing in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
itsuka kimi ga hitomi ni tomosu ai no hikari ga
toki wo koete

tashika ni hitotsu kowasu darou
tamerai wo nomihoshite
kimi ga nozomu mono wa nani?
konna yokubukai akogare no yukue ni
hakanai asu wa aru no?
kodomo no koro
yume ni miteita
shiranai koto bakari
arukitsuzuketa
moshi kimi ga
inochi no hate

shinjitsu ga

magia.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Someday, the light of love that you ignite in your eyes
Will transcend time
And surely shatter one of the dreams of this world
That is rushing towards destruction
Drink up your hesitation
What is it that you desire?
In the destination of such greedy longing
Is there a fleeting tomorrow?
From when I was a child
I've been searching for something
Without knowing what it was
I kept walking
If I can be with you
I'll believe in everything
Even if the dream I'm dreaming
Is just a lie, I'll believe in it
Someday, when you are in pain
I'll come to save you
Because I'm not afraid of anything
Even if the truth is cruel
It doesn't matter what I become
Because I love you, I'll be there
Magia.

scenes.description: The performers are talking on stage following the song.
